BOLT.notes: #465 CLOSED (escapes landed in tree via 851e8cc, lint 16→11). TOP PRIORITY: #466 [P1] P1-2 impure-function-in-render sweep — 5 RSC sites. Target files + lines: src/app/(admin)/admin/layout.tsx:42 (new Date(Date.now() - 24*60*60*1000)), src/app/(admin)/admin/customers/[id]/page.tsx:127 (const now = Date.now()), src/app/(admin)/admin/customers/page.tsx:142 (Date.now() for stats), src/app/(shop)/account/change-email/page.tsx:29 (Date.now() in expression), src/app/(shop)/account/orders/[orderNumber]/page.tsx:60 (Date.now() in expression). These are RSCs — request-time reads are semantically correct, this is lint hygiene. Fix strategy: (1) try hoisting Date construction into a clearly-named local const above the JSX return (audit line 116 suggestion) — if lint still flags, proceed to (2) add `// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity -- request-time read in RSC, not re-rendered` single-line escape. Do NOT refactor into shared helpers across files; do NOT add `'use no cache'` directives (these pages are intentionally dynamic already). Acceptance: lint 11→6 errors, tsc clean, next build green, atomic single commit, Czech diacritics untouched.
